title: 🌟 App Review Month: We Want Your Feedback! 🌟

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
As part of our commitment to improving the review process, we’re dedicating this month to gathering as much input from you as possible. Your insights are invaluable to us!

Take just a minute to share your thoughts by filling out this quick feedback form. Your voice matters and we appreciate your time and efforts!
This will help us plan and alter the process as needed towards 2025
